explanation: Inserted quotes around the command argument to test if the Sigma rule detects the command with additional whitespace or formatting.
Substituted the '/c' flag with '-c' to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to short option syntax variations.
Replaced all flags with their short forms and reordered the arguments to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to argument order or flag syntax.
Omitted the file extension from the executable to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to partial or alternative command names.
Used command substitution to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to encoded or dynamically generated command lines.
